name: supermaestro
description: Requirement intake and mission-control workflow suite for Codex.

scripts.lint:syntax: node --check plugins/supermaestro/scripts/supermaestro.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/scripts/validation-evidence.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/scripts/source-fingerprint.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/skills/mission-control/scripts/harness.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/skills/mission-control/scripts/check-reviewability.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/skills/mission-control/scripts/inspect-ui.js && node --check plugins/supermaestro/skills/lanhu-export/scripts/lanhu-export.mjs
scripts.test: npm run lint:syntax && node tests/supermaestro-smoke.test.js && node tests/supermaestro-v2-smoke.test.js && node tests/supermaestro-strict-contracts.test.js && node tests/supermaestro-validation-evidence.test.js && node plugins/supermaestro/skills/mission-control/scripts/harness.test.js && node plugins/supermaestro/skills/mission-control/scripts/check-reviewability.test.js
